experiment: single-orbit localization study on the generated outfall (PRELIMINARY)
engine: custom HoloOcean fork, same launch line as sonar_visibility/custom_abc_20260716
level: ExampleLevel (fork-internal level; superseded by the official-level phase)

site.true_position_usage: scoring only - never passed to the locator

acquisition: 16-pose orbit, radius 20 m around the diffuser centre, z = bed + 3 m, one deterministic (noise-free) sonar frame per pose, teleport-pinned poses recorded per frame
sweep: 12 chart priors (bearings 0/90/180/270 deg x offsets 10/18/26 m) replayed OFFLINE over the same recorded orbit - NOT independent acquisitions

files.study.json: original sweep with MISSION-DEFAULT gates: 0/12 consensus
files.retune_summary.json: offline gate sweep + clean-frame profile results

results.mission_default_gates: 0/12 consensus (max_area_bins 1500 rejects every true contact: contact areas p50~2200, p90~9500 bins on clean frames)
results.clean_frame_profile: max_area 12000, min_hits 6: consensus 11/12 priors, median error 10.1 m to diffuser centre; strength>=80 variant: 10/12, 8.9 m
results.stable_estimate: (34.1, -7.5) = 9.4 m from diffuser centre, ~7.5 m lateral of the structure axis
results.interpretation: clutter-limited: ExampleLevel native geometry contributes to the consensus cluster; gates are data-regime-dependent and were tuned AFTER seeing this data (hence PRELIMINARY, not a validated benchmark)

caveats: single site, single orbit, one engine session
prior sweep is NOT an independent-run success rate
gates tuned on the same recorded data they are scored on
superseded by the official-level localization v2 plan (background subtraction, separate tuning/validation, independent acquisitions)
